title: floats — Service Architecture
description: Service-oriented vertical stack. API Gateway on top, services stacked vertically, database at bottom. Services reach out horizontally to external APIs.

nodes.label: API Gateway
nodes.description: Top-level entry point. Routes UI requests to appropriate services. Single access point for all features.

nodes.label: Sync Service
nodes.description: Background fetch / cron updater. Runs on BGAppRefreshTask schedule. Reaches out horizontally to external APIs, writes down to database.

nodes.label: SQLite Database (GRDB)
nodes.description: Foundation layer. On-device persistence via GRDB.swift. All services read/write here. Source of truth for offline-first.

nodes.label: External API
nodes.description: Remote third-party or backend API. Reached horizontally by API gateway + sync service. URLSession + async/await.

nodes.label: Domain Models
nodes.description: Shared Sendable structs. Flow between database, services, and API gateway. Define the data contract across layers.
